summary: Security Audit Vulnerability Fix Verification - All 15 tests PASSED. All 5 security findings have been properly fixed: (1) Tenant isolation using tenant-scoped DB in /api/users/list, GDPR endpoints; (2) SSO endpoints removed (404); (3) NoSQL injection prevented with re.escape(); (4) Encryption fails-closed when key missing; (5) Safe disclosure forwarding requires explicit domain allowlist.
critical_code_review_comments: Finding 1 (CRITICAL) VERIFIED: server.py lines 1292-1297, 1439-1452, 1549-1553, 1610-1614, 1637-1641, 1668-1672 all use get_tenant_db(tenant_code) from JWT, no fallback to global db
Finding 2 (HIGH) VERIFIED: SSO files (sso.py, sso_integration.py, saml_simulator.py) deleted. /api/sso/config returns 404
Finding 3 (MEDIUM) VERIFIED: admin.py line 1158 and server.py line 1464 use re.escape() for search queries
Finding 4 (MEDIUM) VERIFIED: field_encryption.py lines 57-58 raise ValueError when _ENCRYPTION_KEY is None. safe_disclosure.py lines 25-28 raise RuntimeError if DOWNLOAD_SECRET not set
Finding 5 (MEDIUM) VERIFIED: safe_disclosure.py lines 1050-1065 require explicit allowed_domains config before forwarding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security audit fixes all verified. Rate limit is 5 logins/minute. GDPR endpoints (my-data-export, my-consent) work for regular users. /api/users/list requires admin/ra role. SSO endpoints return 404. Admin search uses re.escape() for safety.

finding_1_tenant_isolation.notes: All endpoints use tenant-scoped database from JWT. /api/users/list correctly returns 403 for non-admin users.

finding_2_sso_removal.notes: All SSO endpoints return 404. SSO files deleted from filesystem.

finding_3_nosql_injection.notes: Both endpoints use re.escape() for search queries. Tested with malicious inputs (.*$, $ne, etc) - no server errors.

finding_4_encryption_failclosed.notes: encrypt_field() raises ValueError when _ENCRYPTION_KEY is None. safe_disclosure module raises RuntimeError if DOWNLOAD_SECRET not set at import time.

finding_5_forward_allowlist.notes: Returns 403 when no allowed_domains configured. Requires admin role. Domain validation enforced.

tenant_isolation_code_review.server.py_get_current_user: Lines 1292-1297: Uses get_tenant_db(tenant_code) from JWT payload
tenant_isolation_code_review.server.py_users_list: Lines 1439-1452: Fail closed with 'Tenant context required' if no tenant_code
tenant_isolation_code_review.server.py_my_consent: Lines 1637-1641, 1668-1672: Both GET and POST use get_tenant_db(tenant_code)

encryption_failclosed_code_review.field_encryption.py: Lines 57-58: raise ValueError when _ENCRYPTION_KEY is None
encryption_failclosed_code_review.safe_disclosure.py: Lines 25-28: raise RuntimeError if DOWNLOAD_SECRET not set

forward_allowlist_code_review.safe_disclosure.py: Lines 1050-1055: Returns 403 if allowed_domains empty. Lines 1060-1065: Validates email domain against allowlist
